name: Bourbon Chicken2
recipeIngredient: 4 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
6 ounces frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 4 tablespoons butter in a pan over medium heat.
2. Brown the chicken pieces until golden brown on all sides.
3. Reduce heat to low and add the thawed orange juice concentrate.
4. Simmer until the chicken is cooked through and tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
6. Add the bourbon to the remaining sauce in the pan.
7. Return the chicken to the pan and gently heat through for an additional 2-3 minutes.
8. Serve immediately.
